description: Persistent threaded-discussion container. Author renders <article data-comment> children with metadata; component decorates each with author header, relative timestamp, action row (Reply / Edit / Delete) + threaded indentation. Composes <comment-box> (reply form template), <markdown-viewer> (body rendering by author), and bubbles <reaction-bar> events naturally.

attributes.name: data-disabled
attributes.description: Read-only mode — no Reply / Edit / Delete actions

events.name: comment-thread:reply
events.description: Reply form submitted; author should POST and call addComment

events.name: comment-thread:edit-request
events.description: Edit clicked; author renders an inline editor or replaces the body

events.name: comment-thread:delete-request
events.description: Delete clicked; author confirms + calls removeComment

properties.name: addComment
properties.description: Insert a new comment from server data

properties.name: updateComment
properties.description: Patch an existing comment after edit

properties.name: removeComment
properties.description: Remove a comment from the thread

childAttributes.name: data-comment
childAttributes.description: Marks an article as a thread comment

childAttributes.name: data-author-href
childAttributes.description: Optional link to the author's profile

childAttributes.name: data-mine
childAttributes.description: Current user authored this comment — enables Edit / Delete

childAttributes.name: data-parent
childAttributes.description: Id of parent comment for nested replies

childAttributes.name: data-edited
childAttributes.description: ISO timestamp of last edit; renders "(edited)" badge

childAttributes.name: data-reply-form
childAttributes.description: Marks the template whose content is cloned for the reply form
